title: bidens tenera var. typica
intro: Bidens tenera var. typica, also known as the narrow-leaved beggar-ticks or small tickseed, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidens tenera var. typica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Bidens tenera var. typica can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
